description: In this video, we see a group of people enjoying a day on the slopes of a snowy mountain.
The first scene shows two individuals, both dressed in ski gear and equipped with skis, skiing downhill.
One of them is wearing a yellow jacket and the other is in a black coat.
They are both holding ski poles and appear to be in motion.
The next scene features another person, who is also wearing ski gear and is holding ski poles.
This person is wearing a white jacket and is standing still, possibly observing the first two skiers or waiting for their turn.
The third scene features a person in a white jacket and black pants, also holding ski poles, standing in the snow.
